headline: Zoetis Launches Lenivia® (izenivetmab injection) in Canada and the European Union
summary: PARSIPPANY, N.J., July 15, 2026--Zoetis Inc. (NYSE: ZTS) today announced that it has recently launched Lenivia® (izenivetmab injection) in Canada and the European Union (EU) member states – a new long-acting monoclonal antibody (mAb) therapy designed to deliver up to three months of osteoarthritis (OA) pain management with a single subcutaneous injection. Backed by a decade of science and research, Lenivia demonstrated a sustained reduction in pain in a pivotal nine-month European field study, w
